query: CALL db.schema.nodeTypeProperties() YIELD nodeType, propertyName, propertyTypes RETURN nodeType, propertyName, propertyTypes
purpose: Collect node labels and node properties for the schema

query: CALL db.schema.relTypeProperties() YIELD relType, propertyName, propertyTypes RETURN relType, propertyName, propertyTypes
purpose: Collect relationship types and relationship properties for the schema

query: MATCH (s)-[r]->(t) RETURN DISTINCT labels(s) AS fromLabels, type(r) AS relType, labels(t) AS toLabels
purpose: Collect relationship signatures for the schema
